languages.text: "Инициирую наикратчайшее завершение операции". {n}Верхняя, оплавленная часть черепной коробки пациента с хрустом закрывает мозговое вещество, бур на конце тонкого {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}меходендрита{/g} техножреца издает пронзительное жужжание и впивается в кость, грубо возвращая ее на место.{/n} "Запрашиваю ассистирование жизнеформы "вивисектор", заключающееся в наложении комбинированного костного шва. Дальнейшие оперативные вмешательства не требуются".

traits.locale_text: "Инициирую наикратчайшее завершение операции". {n}Верхняя, оплавленная часть черепной коробки пациента с хрустом закрывает мозговое вещество, бур на конце тонкого {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}меходендрита{/g} техножреца издает пронзительное жужжание и впивается в кость, грубо присверливая ее на место.{/n} "Для установки костного лоскута не потребуется помощь единицы вивисектора. Запрашиваю немедленный осмотр Лорда-капитана".
traits.speaker: Augmentator

languages.text: "Initiating expedited completion of the operation." {n}The upper, almost melted portion of the patient's skull closes over the brain matter with a crunch, and the drill at the end of the Tech-Priest's delicate {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} emits a shrill whirring sound before digging into the bone and crudely putting it back into place.{/n} "Requesting assistance from the Vivisector life form by performing composite suturing of bone. No further operative intervention is required."
languages.original_text: "Инициирую наикратчайшее завершение операции". {n}Верхняя, оплавленная часть черепной коробки пациента с хрустом закрывает мозговое вещество, бур на конце тонкого {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}меходендрита{/g} техножреца издает пронзительное жужжание и впивается в кость, грубо возвращая ее на место.{/n} "Запрашиваю ассистирование жизнеформы "вивисектор", заключающееся в наложении комбинированного костного шва. Дальнейшие оперативные вмешательства не требуются".

No further operative intervention is required."

No further operative intervention is required."

"Initiating expedited completion of the operation." {n}The upper, melted portion of the patient's skull closes over the brain matter with a crunch, and the drill at the end of the Tech-Priest's delicate mechadendrite emits a shrill whirring sound and digs into the bone, crudely drilling it into place.{/n} "Placement of the bone flap will not require the vivisector unit's assistance. Requesting the immediate examination of the Lord Captain."

"Initiating expedited completion of the operation." {n}The upper, melted portion of the patient's skull closes over the brain matter with a crunch, and the drill at the end of the Tech-Priest's delicate {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} emits a shrill whirring sound and digs into the bone, crudely putting it back into place.{/n} "Requesting assistance from the Vivisector life form by performing composite suturing of bone. No further operative intervention is required."

"Initiating expedited completion of the operation." {n}The upper, almost melted portion of the patient's skull closes over the brain matter with a crunch, and the drill at the end of the Tech-Priest's delicate {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} emits a shrill whirring sound before digging into the bone and crudely putting it back into place.{/n} "Requesting assistance from the Vivisector life form by performing composite suturing of bone. No further operative intervention is required."

languages.text: 「手術の迅速完了プロトコルを起動。」{n}患者の頭蓋の上部で溶けた部分がばきりと音を立てて脳組織を覆うように閉じ、テックプリーストの繊細な{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}メカデンドライト{/g}の先端にあるドリルが甲高い唸りを上げて骨に食い込み、粗雑に穿孔してその場に固定していく。{/n}「骨弁の固定に生体解剖ユニットの支援は不要。ロード・キャプテンの即時検診を要請する」
languages.original_text: "Initiating expedited completion of the operation." {n}The upper, almost melted portion of the patient's skull closes over the brain matter with a crunch, and the drill at the end of the Tech-Priest's delicate {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} emits a shrill whirring sound before digging into the bone and crudely putting it back into place.{/n} "Requesting assistance from the Vivisector life form by performing composite suturing of bone. No further operative intervention is required."

traits.locale_text: 「手術の迅速完了プロトコルを起動。」{n}患者の頭蓋の上部で溶けた部分がばきりと音を立てて脳組織を覆うように閉じ、テックプリーストの繊細なメカデンドライトの先端にあるドリルが甲高い唸りを上げて骨に食い込み、粗雑に穿孔してその場に固定していく。{/n}「骨弁の固定に生体解剖ユニットの支援は不要。ロード・キャプテンの即時検診を要請する。」

「手術の迅速完了プロトコルを起動。」{n}患者の頭蓋の上部で溶けた部分がばきりと音を立てて脳組織を覆うように閉じ、テックプリーストの繊細な{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}メカデンドライト{/g}の先端にあるドリルが甲高い唸りを上げて骨に食い込み、粗雑に穿孔してその場に固定していく。{/n}「骨弁の固定に生体解剖ユニットの支援は不要。ロード・キャプテンの即時検診を要請する」

languages.text: « Démarrage de la finalisation express de l'opération. » {n}La calotte crânienne quasiment fondue du patient se referme sur son cerveau dans un craquement, puis la foreuse au bout de la délicate {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mécadendrite{/g} du technoprêtre émet un vrombissement aigu avant de s'enfoncer dans l'os pour le visser grossièrement.{/n} « Assistance de l'entité vivisectrice requise pour les sutures composites des os. Aucune autre intervention chirurgicale requise. »
languages.original_text: "Initiating expedited completion of the operation." {n}The upper, almost melted portion of the patient's skull closes over the brain matter with a crunch, and the drill at the end of the Tech-Priest's delicate {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} emits a shrill whirring sound before digging into the bone and crudely putting it back into place.{/n} "Requesting assistance from the Vivisector life form by performing composite suturing of bone. No further operative intervention is required."

traits.locale_text: « Démarrage de la finalisation express de l'opération. » {n}La calotte crânienne quasiment fondue du patient se referme sur son cerveau dans un craquement, puis la foreuse au bout de la délicate {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mécadendrite{/g} du technoprêtre émet un vrombissement aigu avant de s'enfoncer dans l'os pour le visser grossièrement.{/n} « Assistance de l'entité vivisectrice requise pour les sutures composites des os. Aucune autre intervention chirurgicale requise. »

languages.text: "Operasyonu hızlandırılmış tamamlama süreci başlatılıyor." {n}Hastanın kafatasının neredeyse erimiş üst kısmı, bir çatırtıyla beynin üzerine kapanıyor. Tekno Rahip'in narin {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mekadentritinin{/g} ucundaki matkap, tiz bir vınlama sesi çıkararak kemiğe saplanıyor ve onu kabaca yerine oturtuyor.{/n} "Kemiklerin kompozit dikişini yaparak Dirikesimci yaşam formundan yardım isteniyor. Başka bir cerrahi müdahaleye gerek yok."
languages.original_text: "Initiating expedited completion of the operation." {n}The upper, almost melted portion of the patient's skull closes over the brain matter with a crunch, and the drill at the end of the Tech-Priest's delicate {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} emits a shrill whirring sound before digging into the bone and crudely putting it back into place.{/n} "Requesting assistance from the Vivisector life form by performing composite suturing of bone. No further operative intervention is required."

traits.locale_text: "Operasyonu hızlandırılmış tamamlama süreci başlatılıyor." {n}Hastanın kafatasının neredeyse erimiş üst kısmı, bir çatırtıyla beynin üzerine kapanıyor. Tekno Rahip'in narin {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mekadentritinin{/g} ucundaki matkap, tiz bir vınlama sesi çıkararak kemiğe saplanıyor ve onu kabaca yerine oturtuyor.{/n} "Kemiklerin kompozit dikişini yaparak Dirikesimci yaşam formundan yardım isteniyor. Başka bir cerrahi müdahaleye gerek yok."

languages.text: "Beginne mit beschleunigtem Abschluss der Operation." {n}Der fast geschmolzene obere Teil des Schädels des Patienten schließt sich knirschend über der Gehirnmasse, und der Bohrer am Ende des {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendriten{/g} des Techpriesters bohrt sich mit einem schrillen Pfeifen in den Knochen, um diesen wieder zu befestigen. {/n} "Erbitte Unterstützung der Lebensform Vivisektor bei der Kompositversorgung des Knochens. Keine weiteren operativen Maßnahmen erforderlich."
languages.original_text: "Initiating expedited completion of the operation." {n}The upper, almost melted portion of the patient's skull closes over the brain matter with a crunch, and the drill at the end of the Tech-Priest's delicate {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} emits a shrill whirring sound before digging into the bone and crudely putting it back into place.{/n} "Requesting assistance from the Vivisector life form by performing composite suturing of bone. No further operative intervention is required."

traits.locale_text: "Beginne mit beschleunigtem Abschluss der Operation." {n}Der fast geschmolzene obere Teil des Schädels des Patienten schließt sich knirschend über der Gehirnmasse, und der Bohrer am Ende des {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendriten{/g} des Techpriesters bohrt sich mit einem schrillen Pfeifen in den Knochen, um diesen wieder zu befestigen. {/n} "Erbitte Unterstützung der Lebensform Vivisektor bei der Kompositversorgung des Knochens. Keine weiteren operativen Maßnahmen erforderlich."

languages.text: «Iniciando el término acelerado de la operación». {n}La porción superior del cráneo del paciente, casi derretida, se cierra sobre su cerebro con un crujido, y el taladro de la delicada {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mecadendrita{/g} del tecnosacerdote produce un sonido chirriante y perfora el hueso para fijarlo toscamente en su sitio.{/n} «Solicitando ayuda de la forma de vida vivisectora para la sutura compuesta de los huesos. No se necesita intervención adicional por otros sujetos».
languages.original_text: "Initiating expedited completion of the operation." {n}The upper, almost melted portion of the patient's skull closes over the brain matter with a crunch, and the drill at the end of the Tech-Priest's delicate {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} emits a shrill whirring sound before digging into the bone and crudely putting it back into place.{/n} "Requesting assistance from the Vivisector life form by performing composite suturing of bone. No further operative intervention is required."

traits.locale_text: «Iniciando el término acelerado de la operación». {n}La porción superior del cráneo del paciente, casi derretida, se cierra sobre su cerebro con un crujido, y el taladro de la delicada {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mecadendrita{/g} del tecnosacerdote produce un sonido chirriante y perfora el hueso para fijarlo toscamente en su sitio.{/n} «Solicitando ayuda de la forma de vida vivisectora para la sutura compuesta de los huesos. No se necesita intervención adicional por otros sujetos».

languages.text: “开始加速完成手术。”{n}病人头骨上方那几乎熔毁的骨板发出咔嚓声，重新覆盖住脑组织。技术神甫那根纤细{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}机械触须{/g}末端的钻头发出尖锐嗡鸣，随后钻入骨骼，粗暴地将其固定归位。{/n}“请求解剖者生命体协助，执行骨骼复合缝合。无需进一步手术干预。”
languages.original_text: "Initiating expedited completion of the operation." {n}The upper, almost melted portion of the patient's skull closes over the brain matter with a crunch, and the drill at the end of the Tech-Priest's delicate {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} emits a shrill whirring sound before digging into the bone and crudely putting it back into place.{/n} "Requesting assistance from the Vivisector life form by performing composite suturing of bone. No further operative intervention is required."
